# Nightly Recharge Golden Vectors

These vectors characterize `PbNightlyRecoveryStatus` to public nightly recharge model mapping before KMP migration. They focus on deterministic payload conversion and leave PSFTP request routing/error behavior to existing platform tests and future fake-transport coverage. `SleepNightlyRechargeCommonPolicyTest.kt` now executes shared sleep-result date formatting, created/modified timestamp formatting, proto3 zero and empty-string defaults, absent modified timestamp null policy, malformed payload null-result policy, and `sleep-nightly-readiness.json` behavior-family coverage for nightly date/timestamp/default preservation, malformed payload null policy, sleep end-offset policy, timezone-to-UTC instant policy, hypnogram and cycle ordering, sleep-stage enum mapping, partial-night optional policy, platform sleep/nightly vector references, and the `compile-verification-gate` before production nightly recharge and sleep model code moves.
